name: Nerien'eth
location: Nerien'eth in Crypt of Hearts II, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you deal direct damage, you have a 15% chance to summon a Lich crystal that explodes after 2 seconds, dealing 1360 Magic damage to all enemies within 4 meters. This effect can occur once every 3 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
